final_prompt.prompt:

Composition: framing is yours

Scene/backdrop: must include an aerial/sky context with sustainable city development vision elements
Lighting/mood: needs a sustainable-future atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a white-dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures:

Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
